title: Office handoff (verified): auto-review live dry-run judged 21 drafts — plan is 11 delete-duplicate, 10 keep, 0 accept; NOT applied
context: Home-machine session shipped the VS Code extension GUI (v0.4.0, dec_7a7f944536) and harness-driven `hunch auto-review` (dec_cd37bf2d9a). All code committed (95dcc2b) and PUSHED (origin/main == HEAD at handoff). The live harness dry-run FINISHED after handoff started and its plan is now known.
decision: RESUME AT OFFICE. Verified state: (1) `git pull` — all on origin/main (0/0 at handoff). (2) The live `hunch auto-review` dry-run completed: 21 drafts judged via claude-cli (subscription); PLAN = 11 DELETE(duplicate), 10 KEEP-for-human, 0 ACCEPT. The 0 accepts is CORRECT — none of the drafts are Critic-verified, so the dec_a466655539 gate kept them all for a human ('relevant but not Critic-verified/grounded'). One 'irrelevant' draft (dec_8dc263b43e) was KEPT not deleted because harness confidence was 0.35 < 0.7 threshold — the keep-on-uncertainty rail working. (3) The 11 duplicates have specific, correct harness reasons (e.g. dec_6b1172c7d2 restates dec_f6315cfb7f verbatim; several benchmark drafts near-duplicate each other). Notably the harness flagged dec_df253f50b4 (the old roadmap draft) as restated by this session's dec_7a7f944536. (4) DECISION NEEDED: run `hunch auto-review --apply` to delete those 11 duplicates (irreversible from the store) — re-run the dry-run first at the office to reconfirm, since the graph may have changed. (5) Extension v0.4.0 is installed on the HOME machine only; build+install it at the office (npm i && npm run build in vscode-extension/, then vsce package + code --install-extension, or F5). (6) To also auto-accept UNVERIFIED-but-relevant drafts (the 10 kept), that needs a new flag + a decision superseding dec_a466655539 — not built.
consequences: Nothing applied: the 21 real drafts are untouched. --apply would delete 11, accept 0, keep 10.
auto-review's harness judgments verified accurate on real data — dedup reasons are specific and correct; both safety rails (Critic gate, confidence threshold) fired as designed.
Tests 46 pass; typecheck clean except pre-existing node:sqlite decls.
Extension v0.4.0 needs a build+install at the office.
